# Leaphy

Leaphy is a European digital health technology company helping pharmaceutical organisations prepare for electronic Product Information, ePI.

## Core services

- ePI conversion services
- AI-supported ePI conversion workflows
- Word to structured ePI conversion
- PDF to structured ePI conversion
- HL7 FHIR-aligned XML output
- EMA ePI readiness support
- Quality control support
- Metadata handling
- Portfolio-scale ePI conversion
- Managed ePI services
- Strategic ePI partnership
- App and digital medicine information access

## Main audiences

- Pharmaceutical companies
- Marketing Authorisation Holders
- Regulatory Affairs teams
- Labeling Operations teams
- Digital Transformation teams
- Regulatory consultancies
- Healthcare technology partners

## Key pages

- /what-is-epi
- /ema-epi-readiness
- /hl7-fhir-epi
- /epi-conversion-services
- /portfolio-epi-conversion
- /epi-for-regulatory-affairs
- /epi-for-labeling-operations
- /veeva-rim-epi-integration
- /app-and-patient-access
- /contact

## Positioning

Leaphy is not only an app and not only a conversion tool. Leaphy is positioned as a strategic ePI enablement partner supporting compliance readiness, portfolio conversion, operational ePI workflows, future API distribution, resolver services, and interoperability.

## Contact

Companies can contact Leaphy to request an ePI readiness assessment, pilot conversion, portfolio discussion, or strategic partnership conversation.
